positive: A stylized, retro-futuristic woodland creature, reminiscent of a curious fox or a sly cat, composed in a clean silhouette style. The creature is depicted in a playful, central pose, surrounded by abstract natural elements like stylized leaves, geometric vines, and glowing mist. The design features high contrast, utilizing limited, bold colors: deep forest emerald green, burnt orange, and creamy ivory yellow. The overall aesthetic is perfect for screen printing on dark fabric, with sharp edges and graphic clarity. Minimalist line work blended with solid color fills, creating a strong, recognizable icon.
negative: blur, noisy, low quality, amateur, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, solid background, gradient background
